name: Captioning and VQA focus
human_notes: The composition and important objects remain recognizable while the generated version provides a clean visual variation.

name: Style-guided transformation
human_notes: The main subject is preserved and the requested style direction is visible; stronger artistic texture or lighting would improve the final polish.

name: Prompt-based enhancement
human_notes: The output keeps the original layout while improving contrast and visibility; more natural detail would make the enhancement stronger.

name: Failure handling and ambiguous prompt
human_notes: The output keeps the original layout while improving contrast and visibility; more natural detail would make the enhancement stronger. Warning handled: Ambiguity warning: user instruction was vague, so the prompt was enriched using visual context and defaulted to enhancement.
